_description: Claude Rules - Global rules injection for all sessions (delegated to @fusengine/harness, scope 'rules'; reads ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/rules/*.md)

SessionStart._description: Inject all rules into session context at startup

hooks._description: Load and inject rules/*.md into additionalContext (harness reads CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)

SubagentStart._description: Inject all rules into each subagent's context at spawn (requires @fusengine/harness >= 0.1.63 which routes scope 'rules' on SubagentStart)

hooks._description: Load and inject rules/*.md into additionalContext (harness reads CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)

UserPromptSubmit._description: Re-inject rules at every user prompt for persistent context

hooks._description: Reload rules/*.md into additionalContext on each prompt (harness reads CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT)
